name: Ham Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first seven ingredients and place in a rectangular pan, two inches deep.
2. Mix half a cup of brown sugar and 2 teaspoons prepared mustard separately.
3. Spread the mixture over the ham mixture.
4. Bake for 1-1/2 hours at 325 degrees.
5. Mix horseradish sauce ingredients, folding in mayonnaise and whipped cream. Serve in a bowl beside the platter of ham loaf.
